author: w3Lb
content: Delivered in commit 3d8f379 (the previous plan comment was garbled mid-edit; this supersedes it). [Unreleased] removed; #109/#108 + the original bump's #86/#84/#22 entries consolidated into one plain ### Changed after Changed (BREAKING); #111/#106 prepended to ### Added; stale '#106 remaining gap' tail dropped (closed by #109); date -> 2026-06-10. Final 0.3.0 structure: Changed (BREAKING) / Changed / Added / Fixed — verified single header per kind. Doc-only commit, no code.
